channel.title: Tampa Bay News Monitor
channel.description: Press releases and breaking news, Tampa Bay

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Recall issued by Madewell for women's sweaters due to fire risk
item.description: A recall has been issued by Madewell for two women's sweaters due to risk of serious injury or death from burn hazards.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Oscar winner Brenda Fricker, known for ‘My Left Foot’ and ‘Home Alone 2,’ dies
item.description: Oscar-winning actor Brenda Fricker, who played Christy Brown’s mother in “My Left Foot” and the pigeon lady in “Home Alone 2,” has died at 81.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Target recalls specific Cat & Jack children’s sandals due to choking hazard
item.description: A recall has been issued by Target for Cat & Jack-branded children’s sandals. According to the United States Consumer Product Safety Commission, the sandals have decorative pearls which can fall off.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] US escalates Iran attacks with strikes on bridges, ports, power infrastructure
item.description: The U.S. and Iran exchanged major strikes Friday, escalating fighting around the Strait of Hormuz and raising fears of wider regional conflict.

item.title: [WATCHLIST: officer-involved] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Bradenton PD share findings in investigation after officer kills man family says was partially paralyzed
item.description: The Bradenton Police Department (BPD) is scheduled to hold a press conference to discuss the findings of an officer-involved shooting investigation.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Former 'Love During Lock-Up' personality Christopher Chipps arrested in Polk County
item.description: Former reality television star Christopher Chipps is back in jail after law enforcement officials arrested him in Polk County on driving and probation charges.

item.title: [Tampa Bay Beacon (Pinellas)] St. Pete e-bike rider killed in Seminole crash
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] FBI says Manatee Deputy EMS Chief took pictures of sex acts with child
[WATCHLIST: officer-involved] [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Bradenton police chief discusses FDLE findings in officer-involved shooting
[ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] Sarasota Parking Charges
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Swimming in Florida lakes? Safety tips for swimming with gators, snakes
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] South Florida suffering major heat risk today, temperatures to persist
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Why JetBlue dropped some Florida nonstop flights, how to get a refund
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] Slow-moving Gulf system puts Florida on alert for days of soaking rain
[The Florida Channel] 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Interest Rates Used for Appropriations Including PECO Bond Rates
item.description: 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Interest Rates Used for Appropriations Including PECO Bond Rates first appeared on The Florida Channel 7/17/26 Economic Estimating Conference: Interest Rates Used for Appropriations Including PECO Bond Rates first appeared on The Florida Channel

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] SAVE America Act faces steep odds in Senate despite Trump election speech push
item.description: Republicans are pushing the SAVE America Act ahead of midterms, but Senate passage remains uncertain even without Democratic support.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] World Cup beer sales are hopping and brewers hope the stout demand continues
item.description: The World Cup has been a bonanza for beer in the U.S. Bars in Boston reported needing emergency deliveries to keep taps from running dry on some game days.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Breakdown of the key matchups for the 2026 to 2027 season for Tampa Bay Lightning
item.description: The 2026-2027 schedule is out. Sports Anchors Kevin Lewis and Kyle Burger break down key matchups for the season.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Messi bathed Yamal as a baby, now they face off in a World Cup Final
item.description: Almost two decades ago, photographer Joan Monfort didn't think much of his photo shoot of a teenage Lionel Messi bathing a cute baby boy in a plastic bathtub. Not until a remarkable twist of fate.

[ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 'I'm not giving up': Florida mom battles Medicaid denials for special needs son
item.description: A Florida mother is appealing three Medicaid denials for a specialized safety bed prescribed as medically necessary for her 11-year-old adopted son, who has autism and developmental disabilities.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Air quality crisis deepens as wildfire smoke covers Great Lakes, East Coast
item.description: Smoke from Canadian and Minnesota wildfires blanketed parts of the Midwest and East Coast, triggering hazardous air alerts and health warnings for millions.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Sinkhole causes road closure on Bahia Vista St. in Sarasota: SSO
item.description: Sarasota County Sheriff's Office said eastbound lanes of Bahia Vista Street are closed due to a sinkhole.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Taco Bell lettuce supplier under investigation in cyclospora illness outbreak
item.description: Taco Bell removed lettuce from select locations after a multistate cyclospora outbreak linked to shredded iceberg lettuce sickened thousands.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] Pinellas County preschoolers receive a big boost when it comes to literacy
item.description: The Early Learning Coalition of Pinellas County just received a $1.2 million grant to go toward improving child literacy.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 1 dead after shooting in Holiday, investigation underway: PSO
item.description: The Pasco County Sheriff's Office (PSO) said a man is dead after an overnight shooting in Holiday on Friday.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] News to Know for July 17
item.description: Recap of Trump's primetime speech. Plus, 4,000 residents without power in Pinellas after morning storms.

item.title: [ABC Action News / Tampa Bay 28] 4,000 residents without power in Pinellas after storms
item.description: About 4,000 residents in Pinellas County were without power Friday after storms moved through the area, utility officials said.

item.title: [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Hillsborough tests voting machines, reminds voters of key Florida primary deadlines
item.description: As Florida's primary election draws closer, Hillsborough County election officials have completed one of the most important steps before voting begins: publicly testing the machines that will count ballots.

item.title: [BREAKING] [FOX 13 Tampa Bay] Holiday shooting: Man killed after argument, suspect detained: PSO
item.description: A man is dead after an early morning shooting in Holiday, and the suspected gunman is in custody, according to the Pasco Sheriff's Office.

item.title: [BREAKING] [ABC7 Suncoast (WWSB)] BREAKING: Watermain break creates sinkhole on Bahia Vista Street Friday morning.
[Sarasota Herald-Tribune] NHC tracking disturbance off Florida. How it'll affect your weekend
